Features:

- Reverb Effects now has it's own screen with all customisable settings to give more control.

- Added limited support in Ultra mode for various streaming players such as Spotify & Deezer.

- Added custom volume control to adjust volume whilst inside the app.

- Added Notification Service to improve compatibility with various music players

- Many more improvements.


Critical fixes:

- Various bug fixes.
